context: 2020's Dutch chart was shaped by the COVID-19 pandemic boosting streaming numbers. The Weeknd's 'Blinding Lights' became one of the best-performing singles in chart history globally. Dutch artists held their own with Emma Heesters & Rolf Sanchez's Spanish-language crossover, rapper Snelle's Dutch-language romance, and Danny Vera's retro-pop — demonstrating the Netherlands' increasingly diverse musical tastes.
